reviews.comment:
SIn estrellas, hace un mes cargue nafta y comentaban los expendedores que tenian problemas con los filtros, , vuelvo de Miramar y llegando a Balcarce, se me traba ub inyector, llevo el auto a ROMERA HNOS, VW de Balcarce me cambian el inyector y me comenta el jefe de taller que el motivo de la rotura fue la mala calidad de la nafta, logicamente nunca mas cargo en ACA MIRAMAR, son delincuentes, me coasto $ 33000 el arreglo

(Translated by Google)
Without stars, a month ago I filled up with gas and the dealers were saying they had problems with the filters. I returned from Miramar and when I arrived in Balcarce, an injector got stuck. I took the car to ROMERA HNOS, VW in Balcarce. They changed the injector and the shop manager told me that the reason for the breakage was the poor quality of the gas. Obviously, I will never fill up again in MIRAMAR. They are criminals. The repair cost me $33,000.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvb0xYcjBBRRAB
